title: drop residual tombstones + orphan korczewski traefik manifest
description:
## Summary
Follow-up to #526. The earlier pass left three residues from the same cleanup:

- **`Taskfile.yml`** — drop the two remaining \"X removed 2026-05-05\" tombstone comments (`keycloak:sync-secrets` alias, `docs:restart`). #526 already removed two analogous ones; these were the last of the set.
- **`README.md`** — the German task cheat-sheet still listed `task docs:restart`, which no longer exists. Removed the row. CLAUDE.md already documents the removal.
- **`prod-korczewski/traefik.yaml`** (177 lines) — orphan after the cluster merge. Not listed in any kustomization, and the only entrypoint (`task korczewski:traefik:apply`) was deleted in #526. Its purpose — a separate hostNetwork Traefik on the disbanded standalone korczewski cluster — is now served by the unified mentolder cluster's Traefik.

## Test plan
- [x] `task workspace:validate` (kustomize build of `k3d/` still applies)
- [x] `task --list` parses (Taskfile YAML still valid)
- [x] `grep -r prod-korczewski/traefik` returns nothing — file was truly orphan

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
